metadata.description: Official plugin marketplace for Pappardelle — the TUI for multi-clauding without losing your marbles. Includes skills for installing, updating, and configuring Pappardelle.

plugins.name: pappardelle
plugins.description: Install, update, configure, and monitor Pappardelle workspaces. Provides /init-pappardelle (interactive setup wizard), /update-pappardelle (update to latest version), /configure-pappardelle (interactive config editor), and /sous-chef (kitchen-style workspace coordinator).
